prompt:
A cozy café table scene with aesthetic breakfast food, featuring golden toasted bread topped with a soft poached egg, baked beans on the side, and sausages on a paper plate, along with iced coffee drinks in plastic cups with straws. The image is enhanced with adorable hand-drawn doodles—smiling faces on food, tiny arms and legs, blush cheeks, hearts, sparkles, and playful lines. Warm lighting, soft tones, Instagram-style cute overlay, top-down and slightly angled composition, lifestyle food photography, high detail, kawaii aesthetic.

A hand holding a plastic cup of iced green matcha latte inside a car, with a blurred street view in the background. The cup has a logo and is decorated with cute doodle art—animal face, antlers, arms giving thumbs up, small hearts, and blush marks. Soft natural daylight, cozy vibe, pastel green tones, aesthetic lifestyle shot, focus on drink, shallow depth of field, kawaii illustration overlay, high detail.
